title: EarthSciIO conformance case (corpus/cases/<id>.json)
description: One golden conformance case: a resolved URL, its cached blob + manifest, the registry triple that reads it (transport/format/store), and the expected CF-decoded native arrays every language track must reproduce offline.

loader.description: The .esm loader name this fixture stands in for (era5, openaq, ...).

format.description: FORMAT/READER registry key used to decode the blob (netcdf, geotiff, csv, json, zarr).

transport.description: TRANSPORT registry key that would have fetched resolved_url (http, file, s3). In the corpus everything is pre-fetched, so reads are file/store-only.

store.description: STORE-BACKEND registry key holding the blob (local, s3).

resolved_url.description: The fully-resolved URL; sha256(resolved_url) MUST equal cache_key.

blob_path.description: Corpus-relative path to the cached blob (cache/v1/blobs/<key[:2]>/<key>.<ext>).

manifest_path.description: Corpus-relative path to the blob's manifest (cache/v1/meta/<key>.json).

content_sha256.description: sha256 of the blob bytes; MUST equal manifest.sha256_content.

select.description: Optional selection the reader applies before returning arrays (e.g. {time_index: 0}). Absent/empty = return all records.

decode.description: Decode conventions exercised by this case (informational; pins the cross-language parity contract).

coords.description: coordinate name -> native field (with optional units/calendar for time).
